name: nepali-voice-typer
description: A small floating macOS voice typing app for Nepali speech recognition.
author: Ganesh Parajuli

scripts.lint: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/services/googleSpeech.js && node --check src/utils/pasteText.js && node --check src/utils/settingsStore.js

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nepali Voice Typer needs microphone access to record speech for transcription.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Nepali Voice Typer uses Apple Events to paste recognized text into the active app.
